definition: A very short unit of time

Today is a good day.
I see her once a week.

definition: One of twelve periods in a year

definition: A period of one hundred years
exampleSentence: The building is over a century old.

definition: The part of the day between noon and evening

exampleSentence: Warm air currents rise from the heated ground.

definition: A wind blowing from land toward the sea, usually at night

definition: A warm, dry wind descending a mountain

definition: A factor that influences climate patterns

exampleSentence: The rainstorm lasted through the night.
The snowstorm closed the mountain roads.

definition: A severe snowstorm with strong winds
exampleSentence: The blizzard buried the town in snow.

definition: A mix of rain and snow

definition: The capacity to withstand periods without rain

definition: A situation where water demand exceeds supply

definition: A bond used to fund environmentally friendly projects

definition: Money set aside for climate-related projects

definition: Money used to help communities adjust to climate change

definition: Discussions between countries about climate policy

exampleSentence: Carbon accounting helps companies track their impact.

definition: The process of reducing carbon emissions

definition: A business heavily affected by weather conditions

definition: An observable event in the atmosphere

definition: Colorful lights seen in the sky near the poles

definition: A visible electrical discharge during storms

definition: The process by which fog develops

definition: A large area covered with trees

We walked through the woods.
The jungle is full of wildlife.

definition: A dense forest in a tropical, rainy area
exampleSentence: The rainforest receives heavy rainfall.

definition: A tall plant with a trunk and branches
exampleSentence: A big tree grows behind the house.

definition: The main stem of a tree
exampleSentence: The trunk was too thick to circle with two arms.

definition: A part of a tree growing from the trunk

definition: The part of a plant that grows underground
exampleSentence: Tree roots hold the soil in place.

definition: The outer covering of a tree trunk
exampleSentence: The bark of this tree is rough.

definition: A flat green part of a plant

definition: An open area in a forest

exampleSentence: A grove of bamboo grew by the stream.

definition: A dense group of bushes or small trees

definition: A section of a cut tree trunk

definition: Wood made of thin layers glued together

definition: A place where logs are cut into boards

definition: Fine wood particles left after cutting
exampleSentence: Sawdust covered the workshop floor.

definition: A person who cuts down trees for a living

definition: A person or company that harvests trees

definition: The clearing of forests, often for other uses

definition: Forest management that preserves resources long-term

definition: Land covered with trees suitable for timber

definition: Land covered with trees, smaller than a forest

exampleSentence: Pine trees are evergreen.

exampleSentence: Coniferous forests grow in cooler climates.

definition: Wood from broadleaf trees, usually dense
exampleSentence: Teak is a valuable hardwood.

definition: Wood from coniferous trees, usually lighter

definition: A group of related living organisms

exampleSentence: Volunteers planted saplings along the trail.

definition: A very young plant grown from seed

definition: A place where young trees are grown
exampleSentence: Seedlings are raised in a forest nursery.

definition: A place where many kinds of trees are grown for study

definition: An organized effort to plant new forests
exampleSentence: The afforestation program restored the hillside.
laoTranslation: ໂຄງການປູກປ່າໃໝ່
thaiTranslation: โครงการปลูกป่าใหม่

definition: A forest that protects a river's water source
exampleSentence: The watershed forest keeps the river clean.
laoTranslation: ປ່າຕົ້ນນ້ຳ

definition: A forest maintained to prevent erosion or flooding
exampleSentence: The protective forest stabilizes the steep slope.
laoTranslation: ປ່າປ້ອງກັນ
thaiTranslation: ป่าอนุรักษ์

definition: A forest managed mainly for timber harvest
exampleSentence: The production forest supplies the local sawmill.
thaiTranslation: ป่าเพื่อการผลิต

definition: A forest area separating protected land from other uses
exampleSentence: The buffer forest reduces conflict between farms and the reserve.

definition: Categorizing land by its use or type
exampleSentence: Land classification determines what can be built.
laoTranslation: ການຈັດປະເພດທີ່ດິນ
thaiTranslation: การจำแนกประเภทที่ดิน

definition: A map showing measured land boundaries
exampleSentence: The land survey map guided the new road.
laoTranslation: ແຜນທີ່ສຳຫລວດທີ່ດິນ
thaiTranslation: แผนที่สำรวจที่ดิน

definition: A map showing the shape and height of land
exampleSentence: The topographic map showed steep terrain ahead.
laoTranslation: ແຜນທີ່ພູມສັນຖານ
thaiTranslation: แผนที่ภูมิประเทศ

definition: A line on a map showing equal elevation
exampleSentence: Contour lines reveal the mountain's steepness.
laoTranslation: ເສັ້ນຊັ້ນຄວາມສູງ
thaiTranslation: เส้นชั้นความสูง

definition: A map showing the height of the land
exampleSentence: The elevation map helped plan the trail.
laoTranslation: ແຜນທີ່ຄວາມສູງ
thaiTranslation: แผนที่ระดับความสูง

definition: Pictures of Earth's surface taken from space
exampleSentence: Satellite imagery tracks deforestation over time.
laoTranslation: ພາບຖ່າຍດາວທຽມ
thaiTranslation: ภาพถ่ายดาวเทียม

definition: The physical material covering the land, like forest or grass
exampleSentence: Land cover maps show forest, farmland, and urban areas.
laoTranslation: ພື້ນທີ່ປົກຄຸມດິນ
thaiTranslation: สิ่งปกคลุมดิน

definition: A shift in how a piece of land is used
exampleSentence: Land use change from forest to farmland is common.
laoTranslation: ການປ່ຽນແປງການນຳໃຊ້ທີ່ດິນ
thaiTranslation: การเปลี่ยนแปลงการใช้ที่ดิน

definition: A decline in a forest's health or density
exampleSentence: Selective logging can lead to forest degradation.
laoTranslation: ຄວາມເສື່ອມໂຊມຂອງປ່າ
thaiTranslation: ความเสื่อมโทรมของป่า

definition: Efforts to return a forest to a healthy state
exampleSentence: Forest restoration includes planting native species.
laoTranslation: ການຟື້ນຟູປ່າໄມ້
thaiTranslation: การฟื้นฟูป่าไม้

definition: Restoring a damaged ecosystem to health
exampleSentence: Ecological restoration revived the wetland.
laoTranslation: ການຟື້ນຟູລະບົບນິເວດ
thaiTranslation: การฟื้นฟูระบบนิเวศ

definition: Responsible management and care of land
exampleSentence: Good land stewardship benefits future generations.
laoTranslation: ການເບິ່ງແຍງທີ່ດິນ
thaiTranslation: การดูแลรักษาที่ดิน

definition: Traditional rights of communities to use forest resources
exampleSentence: Customary forest rights allow villagers to gather bamboo.
laoTranslation: ສິດໃນປ່າຕາມປະເພນີ
thaiTranslation: สิทธิในป่าตามจารีตประเพณี

definition: A community relying on the forest for its livelihood
exampleSentence: The forest dependent community harvests rattan sustainably.
laoTranslation: ຊຸມຊົນເພິ່ງພາປ່າ
thaiTranslation: ชุมชนที่พึ่งพาป่า

definition: Collecting forest products other than wood
exampleSentence: Mushroom gathering is a form of non-timber forest product harvesting.
laoTranslation: ການເກັບກ່ຽວຜະລິດຕະພັນປ່າໄມ້ນອກຈາກໄມ້
thaiTranslation: การเก็บเกี่ยวผลิตภัณฑ์จากป่าที่ไม่ใช่ไม้

definition: A climbing palm used to make furniture
exampleSentence: Rattan is woven into baskets and chairs.
Resin tapping provides extra income for families.
laoTranslation: ການເກັບຢາງໄມ້
thaiTranslation: การกรีดยางไม้

definition: Measures taken to stop forest fires from starting
exampleSentence: Forest fire prevention includes clearing dry brush.
laoTranslation: ການປ້ອງກັນໄຟປ່າ
thaiTranslation: การป้องกันไฟป่า

definition: A cleared strip that stops the spread of fire
exampleSentence: Workers cut a firebreak around the village.

definition: Planning and controlling fire in a landscape
exampleSentence: Fire management includes controlled burns.
laoTranslation: ການຄຸ້ມຄອງໄຟປ່າ
thaiTranslation: การจัดการไฟป่า

definition: A fee paid for the right to harvest timber
exampleSentence: The company pays a timber royalty to the government.
laoTranslation: ຄ່າພາກຫລວງໄມ້
thaiTranslation: ค่าภาคหลวงไม้

definition: A payment for standing timber before it is cut
exampleSentence: The stumpage fee is based on tree volume.
laoTranslation: ຄ່າທຳນຽມໄມ້ຢືນຕົ້ນ
thaiTranslation: ค่าธรรมเนียมไม้ยืนต้น

definition: A road built to access timber for harvest
exampleSentence: The logging road cuts through the reserve.
laoTranslation: ເສັ້ນທາງຕັດໄມ້
thaiTranslation: ถนนสำหรับการตัดไม้

definition: A path used to drag logs out of a forest
exampleSentence: Rain eroded the old skid trail.
laoTranslation: ເສັ້ນທາງລາກໄມ້
thaiTranslation: เส้นทางลากไม้

definition: A road used to transport logs from the forest
exampleSentence: Trucks use the haul road to reach the mill.
laoTranslation: ເສັ້ນທາງຂົນສົ່ງໄມ້
thaiTranslation: ถนนขนส่งไม้

definition: A forest grown specifically for fuel or energy
exampleSentence: The biomass plantation supplies the power plant.
laoTranslation: ສວນປູກເພື່ອຊີວະມວນ
thaiTranslation: สวนป่าเพื่อชีวมวล

definition: Managing forests to store carbon and reduce emissions
exampleSentence: Carbon forestry projects earn carbon credits.
laoTranslation: ປ່າໄມ້ເພື່ອຄາບອນ
thaiTranslation: ป่าไม้เพื่อคาร์บอน

definition: A certificate representing reduced carbon emissions
exampleSentence: The reforestation project sold carbon credits abroad.
laoTranslation: ເຄຣດິດຄາບອນ
thaiTranslation: เครดิตคาร์บอน

definition: A program reducing emissions from deforestation
exampleSentence: The country joined a REDD+ program for forest protection.

definition: Tracking changes in forest health over time
exampleSentence: Forest degradation monitoring uses satellite data.
laoTranslation: ການເຝົ້າລະວັງຄວາມເສື່ອມໂຊມປ່າ
thaiTranslation: การเฝ้าติดตามความเสื่อมโทรมของป่า

definition: The buying and selling of wood products
exampleSentence: The timber trade supports thousands of jobs.

definition: A facility that produces plywood from logs
exampleSentence: The plywood factory processes local timber.
laoTranslation: ໂຮງງານໄມ້ອັດ
thaiTranslation: โรงงานไม้อัด

definition: A place where cut wood is stored and sold
exampleSentence: We bought planks from the lumber yard.
laoTranslation: ບ່ອນເກັບໄມ້ແປຮູບ
thaiTranslation: ลานเก็บไม้แปรรูป

definition: Fibrous material used to make paper
exampleSentence: Wood pulp is processed into paper at the mill.

definition: A base where forest rangers are stationed
exampleSentence: Report the fire to the forest ranger station.
laoTranslation: ສະຖານີພະນັກງານປ່າສະຫງວນ
thaiTranslation: สถานีเจ้าหน้าที่พิทักษ์ป่า

definition: A sign guiding hikers through a forest
exampleSentence: Follow the forest trail markers to the summit.
laoTranslation: ເຄື່ອງໝາຍເສັ້ນທາງໃນປ່າ
thaiTranslation: ป้ายบอกเส้นทางในป่า

definition: The total height climbed on a hike
exampleSentence: The trail has a steep elevation gain.
laoTranslation: ຄວາມສູງທີ່ຂຶ້ນໄດ້
thaiTranslation: ระดับความสูงที่เพิ่มขึ้น

exampleSentence: The mountain range separates the two valleys.
laoTranslation: ຕ່ວງພູເຂົາ

definition: The elevation above which trees do not grow
exampleSentence: Above the timberline, only grass and moss grow.
laoTranslation: ເສັ້ນຂອບເຂດຕົ້ນໄມ້
thaiTranslation: แนวเขตต้นไม้

definition: The area above the timberline on a mountain
exampleSentence: Few plants survive in the alpine zone.
thaiTranslation: เขตอัลไพน์

definition: The speed at which forest is being cleared
exampleSentence: The deforestation rate slowed after new regulations.
laoTranslation: ອັດຕາການທຳລາຍປ່າໄມ້
thaiTranslation: อัตราการตัดไม้ทำลายป่า

definition: The reduction of forest area over time
exampleSentence: Forest loss accelerated during the drought years.
laoTranslation: ການສູນເສຍປ່າໄມ້
thaiTranslation: การสูญเสียป่าไม้

definition: A decrease in the number of trees in an area
exampleSentence: Tree loss along the river increased flooding.
laoTranslation: ການສູນເສຍຕົ້ນໄມ້
thaiTranslation: การสูญเสียต้นไม้

definition: An increase in forest area, often through planting
exampleSentence: Forest gain resulted from a decade of reforestation.
laoTranslation: ພື້ນທີ່ປ່າເພີ່ມຂຶ້ນ
thaiTranslation: พื้นที่ป่าที่เพิ่มขึ้น

definition: The overall change in forest area, gain minus loss
exampleSentence: Net forest change was positive this year.
laoTranslation: ການປ່ຽນແປງປ່າໄມ້ສຸດທິ
thaiTranslation: การเปลี่ยนแปลงพื้นที่ป่าสุทธิ

definition: The number of trees within a given area
exampleSentence: Tree density is higher in the untouched valley.
laoTranslation: ຄວາມໜາແໜ້ນຕົ້ນໄມ້
thaiTranslation: ความหนาแน่นของต้นไม้

definition: A group of trees of similar age and type
exampleSentence: The pine stand was planted twenty years ago.

definition: A group of trees all of the same age
exampleSentence: The plantation is an even-aged stand of pine.
laoTranslation: ປ່າອາຍຸເທົ່າກັນ
thaiTranslation: ป่าไม้อายุเสมอกัน

definition: A forest area with trees of different ages
exampleSentence: Old-growth forests are usually uneven-aged stands.
laoTranslation: ປ່າອາຍຸບໍ່ເທົ່າກັນ
thaiTranslation: ป่าไม้อายุไม่เสมอกัน

definition: The natural change in forest composition over time
exampleSentence: Forest succession follows a wildfire.
laoTranslation: ການສືບຕໍ່ຂອງປ່າໄມ້
thaiTranslation: การทดแทนของป่าไม้

definition: The first species to grow in a disturbed area
exampleSentence: Pioneer species colonize land after a fire.
laoTranslation: ຊະນິດພັນບຸກເບີກ
thaiTranslation: ชนิดพันธุ์บุกเบิก

exampleSentence: The climax forest has grown undisturbed for centuries.
laoTranslation: ປ່າຂັ້ນສູງສຸດ
thaiTranslation: ป่าไคลแมกซ์

definition: How forests change when trees fall and create openings
exampleSentence: Gap dynamics allow new trees to grow.
laoTranslation: ພະລວັດຊ່ອງຫວ່າງປ່າ
thaiTranslation: พลวัตช่องว่างในป่า

definition: An opening in the forest canopy
exampleSentence: Sunlight reaches the ground through the canopy gap.
laoTranslation: ຊ່ອງຫວ່າງເຮືອນຍອດ
thaiTranslation: ช่องว่างในเรือนยอด

definition: The boundary between forest and open land
exampleSentence: Wildlife often gathers at the forest edge.

definition: Ecological changes that occur at habitat boundaries
exampleSentence: The edge effect changes plant growth near clearings.
laoTranslation: ຜົນກະທົບຂອບເຂດ
thaiTranslation: ผลกระทบขอบพื้นที่

definition: The area of forest away from its edges
exampleSentence: Rare species are found in the forest interior.
thaiTranslation: พื้นที่ตอนในของป่า

definition: The central, undisturbed part of a habitat
exampleSentence: Core habitat is essential for shy wildlife.
laoTranslation: ແຫລ່ງທີ່ຢູ່ອາໄສຫລັກ
thaiTranslation: ถิ่นที่อยู่หลัก

definition: The defined edge of a piece of land
exampleSentence: The land parcel boundary was marked with stones.
laoTranslation: ຂອບເຂດຕອນດິນ
thaiTranslation: แนวเขตแปลงที่ดิน

definition: A physical sign showing a land boundary
exampleSentence: A boundary marker showed where the reserve began.
laoTranslation: ເຄື່ອງໝາຍຂອບເຂດ
thaiTranslation: หมุดหมายเขตแดน

definition: The process of settling a disagreement over land
exampleSentence: Land dispute resolution took several months.
laoTranslation: ການແກ້ໄຂຂໍ້ຂັດແຍ້ງທີ່ດິນ
thaiTranslation: การแก้ไขข้อพิพาทที่ดิน

exampleSentence: Customary tenure governs much of the village's land.
laoTranslation: ການຄອບຄອງທີ່ດິນຕາມປະເພນີ
thaiTranslation: การถือครองที่ดินตามจารีตประเพณี

exampleSentence: Formal tenure gives farmers access to bank loans.
laoTranslation: ການຄອບຄອງທີ່ດິນຢ່າງເປັນທາງການ
thaiTranslation: การถือครองที่ดินอย่างเป็นทางการ

definition: The official recording of land ownership
exampleSentence: Land registration reduces disputes between neighbors.
laoTranslation: ການຈົດທະບຽນທີ່ດິນ
thaiTranslation: การจดทะเบียนที่ดิน

exampleSentence: The farmer received a land certificate after the survey.
laoTranslation: ໃບຢັ້ງຢືນທີ່ດິນ
thaiTranslation: โฉนดที่ดิน

definition: An official plan guiding how land will be used
exampleSentence: The land use plan set aside area for a new forest.
laoTranslation: ແຜນການນຳໃຊ້ທີ່ດິນ
thaiTranslation: ผังการใช้ที่ดิน

definition: A map showing permitted land uses in an area
exampleSentence: The zoning map restricts building near the river.
laoTranslation: ແຜນທີ່ແບ່ງເຂດ
thaiTranslation: แผนที่การแบ่งเขต

definition: A strip of vegetation protecting land from erosion
exampleSentence: A buffer strip protects the stream from farm runoff.

definition: Vegetation along a riverbank that protects water quality
exampleSentence: The riparian buffer filters pollutants before they reach the river.
laoTranslation: ແຖບກັນຊົນແຄມນ້ຳ
thaiTranslation: แนวกันชนริมฝั่งน้ำ

definition: A connected strip of natural habitat
exampleSentence: The green corridor links two forest reserves.
laoTranslation: ທາງເຊື່ອມສີຂຽວ
thaiTranslation: ระเบียงสีเขียว

definition: An organization that protects land for conservation
exampleSentence: The land trust purchased the forest to protect it.
laoTranslation: ອົງການອະນຸລັກທີ່ດິນ
thaiTranslation: องค์กรอนุรักษ์ที่ดิน

definition: A legal agreement limiting land development to protect nature
exampleSentence: The conservation easement prevents logging on the property.
laoTranslation: ຂໍ້ຕົກລົງອະນຸລັກທີ່ດິນ
thaiTranslation: ข้อตกลงอนุรักษ์ที่ดิน

definition: A forest area legally safeguarded from development
exampleSentence: Hunting is banned in the protected forest area.
laoTranslation: ເຂດປ່າປົກປ້ອງ
thaiTranslation: พื้นที่ป่าคุ้มครอง

definition: Land set aside to protect forest resources
exampleSentence: The forest reserve is closed to logging.
Elephants roam freely in the game reserve.
laoTranslation: ເຂດສະຫງວນສັດປ່າ
thaiTranslation: เขตสงวนสัตว์ป่า

definition: A protected area balancing conservation and sustainable use
exampleSentence: The biosphere reserve supports both wildlife and local farms.
laoTranslation: ເຂດສະຫງວນຊີວະມົນທົນ
thaiTranslation: เขตสงวนชีวมณฑล

definition: A location recognized for outstanding natural or cultural value
exampleSentence: The ancient forest became a UNESCO site.
laoTranslation: ແຫລ່ງມໍລະດົກຢູເນສໂກ
thaiTranslation: แหล่งมรดกยูเนสโก

definition: A forest with historical or cultural significance
exampleSentence: The heritage forest is sacred to the local community.
laoTranslation: ປ່າມູນມໍລະດົກ

definition: A forest area protected for spiritual reasons
exampleSentence: Villagers protect the sacred grove from logging.
laoTranslation: ດົງໄມ້ສັກສິດ
thaiTranslation: ป่าศักดิ์สิทธิ์

definition: Traditional community methods of managing forests
exampleSentence: Customary forest management has protected the area for generations.
laoTranslation: ການຄຸ້ມຄອງປ່າຕາມປະເພນີ
thaiTranslation: การจัดการป่าตามจารีตประเพณี

definition: Forest management shared between government and community
exampleSentence: Joint forest management improved local livelihoods.
laoTranslation: ການຄຸ້ມຄອງປ່າຮ່ວມ
thaiTranslation: การจัดการป่าร่วมกัน

definition: Forest management involving local communities in decisions
exampleSentence: Participatory forestry gives villagers a voice in logging decisions.
laoTranslation: ປ່າໄມ້ແບບມີສ່ວນຮ່ວມ
thaiTranslation: การป่าไม้แบบมีส่วนร่วม

definition: A way of earning a living from forest resources
exampleSentence: Forest livelihood includes gathering fruit and honey.
laoTranslation: ການດຳລົງຊີບຈາກປ່າ
thaiTranslation: การดำรงชีพจากป่า

definition: An economy relying heavily on forest products
exampleSentence: The forest-based economy supports many rural families.
laoTranslation: ເສດຖະກິດອີງໃສ່ປ່າໄມ້
thaiTranslation: เศรษฐกิจที่พึ่งพาป่าไม้

definition: The business of producing and selling wood products
exampleSentence: The timber industry is a major employer here.
laoTranslation: ອຸດສາຫະກຳໄມ້
thaiTranslation: อุตสาหกรรมไม้

definition: The business of turning wood into paper products
exampleSentence: The pulp and paper industry uses fast-growing trees.
laoTranslation: ອຸດສາຫະກຳເຍື່ອ ແລະ ເຈ້ຍ
thaiTranslation: อุตสาหกรรมเยื่อและกระดาษ

definition: A facility that turns raw timber into products
exampleSentence: The wood processing plant employs two hundred workers.
laoTranslation: ໂຮງງານປຸງແຕ່ງໄມ້

exampleSentence: Tree species identification is a key forestry skill.

definition: The study of the financial aspects of forestry

definition: The capacity of land to produce crops or timber

definition: A government agency managing forest resources

definition: A government department overseeing farming policy
exampleSentence: The ministry of agriculture announced new subsidies.

definition: A government department overseeing forest management
exampleSentence: The ministry of forestry approved the reforestation plan.
laoTranslation: ກະຊວງປ່າໄມ້

definition: A government body overseeing land matters
exampleSentence: The land commission reviewed the boundary dispute.

definition: A government official responsible for forest oversight
exampleSentence: The forestry officer inspected the logging site.

definition: A government official who manages land records
exampleSentence: The land officer processed the new title deed.

definition: The forced movement of people from their homes
exampleSentence: Deforestation caused the displacement of local wildlife.
laoTranslation: ການເຄື່ອນຍ້າຍ
thaiTranslation: การพลัดถิ่น

definition: Land traditionally owned by native communities
exampleSentence: Indigenous land rights are protected under the new law.
laoTranslation: ທີ່ດິນຊົນເຜົ່າພື້ນເມືອງ
thaiTranslation: ที่ดินของชนพื้นเมือง

definition: Land historically owned by a family or community
exampleSentence: The ancestral land has been farmed for generations.
laoTranslation: ທີ່ດິນມູນມໍລະດົກ
thaiTranslation: ที่ดินของบรรพบุรุษ

definition: Land traditionally used and managed by a tribe
exampleSentence: Tribal land is governed by traditional customs.
laoTranslation: ທີ່ດິນຊົນເຜົ່າ
thaiTranslation: ที่ดินของชนเผ่า

definition: A person responsible for protecting land on behalf of others
exampleSentence: The village elder acts as land custodian.
laoTranslation: ຜູ້ຄຸ້ມຄອງທີ່ດິນ
thaiTranslation: ผู้ดูแลที่ดิน

definition: A person or group responsible for protecting a forest
exampleSentence: The community serves as forest custodian for the reserve.
laoTranslation: ຜູ້ຄຸ້ມຄອງປ່າ
thaiTranslation: ผู้ดูแลรักษาป่า

definition: A person who has become wealthy through the timber trade
exampleSentence: The timber tycoon owns vast tracts of forest.
thaiTranslation: เจ้าพ่อธุรกิจไม้

definition: A business that harvests and sells timber
exampleSentence: The logging company received approval for the new site.
laoTranslation: ບໍລິສັດຕັດໄມ້
thaiTranslation: บริษัทตัดไม้

definition: A company hired to carry out forestry work
exampleSentence: The forestry contractor cleared the fire-damaged trees.
laoTranslation: ຜູ້ຮັບເໝົາປ່າໄມ້
thaiTranslation: ผู้รับเหมางานป่าไม้

definition: A person or company that builds on undeveloped land
exampleSentence: The land developer wanted to clear the forest for housing.
laoTranslation: ນັກພັດທະນາທີ່ດິນ
thaiTranslation: ผู้พัฒนาที่ดิน

definition: Building new housing or commercial property on land
exampleSentence: Real estate development is expanding into farmland.
laoTranslation: ການພັດທະນາອະສັງຫາລິມະຊັບ
thaiTranslation: การพัฒนาอสังหาริมทรัพย์

definition: The growth of a city into surrounding land
exampleSentence: Urban expansion has reduced nearby forest cover.
laoTranslation: ການຂະຫຍາຍຕົວເມືອງ
thaiTranslation: การขยายตัวของเมือง

definition: Land on the edge between city and countryside
exampleSentence: Peri-urban areas often face rapid land use change.
laoTranslation: ເຂດຊານເມືອງ
thaiTranslation: พื้นที่ชานเมือง

definition: Buying land in hopes its value will rise
exampleSentence: Land speculation drove up prices near the new highway.
laoTranslation: ການເກັງກຳໄລທີ່ດິນ
thaiTranslation: การเก็งกำไรที่ดิน

definition: Holding land for future development or profit
exampleSentence: The company practiced land banking near the growing town.
laoTranslation: ການສະສົມທີ່ດິນ
thaiTranslation: การกักตุนที่ดิน

definition: Previously developed land, often contaminated, awaiting reuse
exampleSentence: The brownfield land was cleaned up before construction.
laoTranslation: ດິນອຸດສາຫະກຳເກົ່າ
thaiTranslation: ที่ดินอุตสาหกรรมเก่า

definition: Undeveloped land, often agricultural or natural
exampleSentence: Building on greenfield land reduces available farmland.
laoTranslation: ດິນທີ່ຍັງບໍ່ພັດທະນາ
thaiTranslation: ที่ดินที่ยังไม่พัฒนา

definition: An effort to restore or create usable land
exampleSentence: The land reclamation project turned the quarry into parkland.
laoTranslation: ໂຄງການຟື້ນຟູທີ່ດິນ
thaiTranslation: โครงการถมคืนที่ดิน

definition: Restoring land damaged by mining activities
exampleSentence: Mining rehabilitation replanted native trees on the site.
laoTranslation: ການບູລະນະຫລັງການຂຸດຄົ້ນບໍ່ແຮ່
thaiTranslation: การฟื้นฟูพื้นที่หลังทำเหมือง

definition: A large surface mine dug into the land
exampleSentence: The open-pit mine altered the landscape significantly.
laoTranslation: ບໍ່ແຮ່ເປີດ
thaiTranslation: เหมืองเปิด

definition: A place where stone or minerals are dug from the ground
exampleSentence: The quarry supplies stone for local construction.

definition: The gradual sinking of land, often from resource extraction
exampleSentence: Land subsidence damaged buildings near the old mine.
laoTranslation: ການຊຸດຕົວຂອງທີ່ດິນ
thaiTranslation: การทรุดตัวของแผ่นดิน

definition: The compressing of soil, reducing its ability to absorb water
exampleSentence: Heavy machinery causes soil compaction in farm fields.
laoTranslation: ການອັດແໜ້ນຂອງດິນ
thaiTranslation: การอัดแน่นของดิน

definition: Restoring degraded land to a productive state
exampleSentence: Land rehabilitation returned the mine site to forest.
laoTranslation: ການບູລະນະທີ່ດິນ
thaiTranslation: การฟื้นฟูที่ดิน

definition: Restoring a damaged watershed to protect water resources
exampleSentence: Watershed rehabilitation reduced flooding downstream.
laoTranslation: ການບູລະນະພື້ນທີ່ຮັບນ້ຳ
thaiTranslation: การฟื้นฟูลุ่มน้ำ

definition: Coordinated planning across different land uses
exampleSentence: Integrated land management balances farming and forest protection.
laoTranslation: ການຄຸ້ມຄອງທີ່ດິນແບບປະສົມປະສານ
thaiTranslation: การจัดการที่ดินแบบบูรณาการ

definition: Land managed for more than one purpose
exampleSentence: The multi-use land supports both grazing and forestry.

thaiTranslation: ที่ดินใช้ประโยชน์หลายด้าน

definition: A disagreement between different intended uses of land
exampleSentence: Land use conflict arose between farmers and loggers.

definition: Officially dividing land into designated use categories
exampleSentence: Land use zoning separates residential and industrial areas.

thaiTranslation: การแบ่งเขตการใช้ที่ดิน

definition: Large-scale efforts to restore degraded forest landscapes
exampleSentence: Forest landscape restoration combines tree planting and community support.
laoTranslation: ການຟື້ນຟູພູມທັດປ່າໄມ້
thaiTranslation: การฟื้นฟูภูมิทัศน์ป่าไม้

definition: Trees or branches that have fallen naturally
exampleSentence: Deadfall blocked the hiking trail after the storm.
laoTranslation: ຕົ້ນໄມ້ລົ້ມ
thaiTranslation: ต้นไม้ที่ล้มตามธรรมชาติ

exampleSentence: The windfall provided free firewood for the village.
laoTranslation: ຕົ້ນໄມ້ລົ້ມຍ້ອນລົມ
thaiTranslation: ต้นไม้ที่ล้มเพราะลม

definition: Official permission required to cut down a tree
exampleSentence: A tree felling permit is needed for large trees.
laoTranslation: ໃບອະນຸຍາດໂຄ່ນຕົ້ນໄມ້
thaiTranslation: ใบอนุญาตโค่นต้นไม้

definition: Official approval to gather timber or crops
exampleSentence: The harvest permit specified which trees could be cut.

thaiTranslation: ใบอนุญาตเก็บเกี่ยว

definition: Legal authorization to cut trees commercially
exampleSentence: The logging permit expired at the end of the year.
laoTranslation: ໃບອະນຸຍາດຕັດໄມ້
thaiTranslation: ใบอนุญาตตัดไม้

definition: Official approval required before certain land activities
exampleSentence: An environmental permit was required before clearing the site.
laoTranslation: ໃບອະນຸຍາດສິ່ງແວດລ້ອມ
thaiTranslation: ใบอนุญาตด้านสิ่งแวดล้อม

definition: Official approval to remove vegetation from land
exampleSentence: A land clearance permit was denied due to erosion risk.
laoTranslation: ໃບອະນຸຍາດແຜ້ວຖາງທີ່ດິນ
thaiTranslation: ใบอนุญาตถางที่ดิน

definition: Regular monitoring of a forest by rangers
exampleSentence: The forest ranger patrol checks for illegal activity daily.
laoTranslation: ການລາດຕະເວນຂອງເຈົ້າໜ້າທີ່ປ່າ
thaiTranslation: การลาดตระเวนของเจ้าหน้าที่พิทักษ์ป่า

definition: A team dedicated to stopping illegal hunting
exampleSentence: The anti-poaching unit patrols the reserve at night.
laoTranslation: ໜ່ວຍຕ້ານການລ່າສັດຜິດກົດໝາຍ

definition: Tracking the health and numbers of wild animals
exampleSentence: Wildlife monitoring uses camera traps in the forest.
laoTranslation: ການເຝົ້າລະວັງສັດປ່າ
thaiTranslation: การเฝ้าติดตามสัตว์ป่า

definition: A hidden camera used to photograph wildlife
exampleSentence: The camera trap captured images of a rare leopard.

thaiTranslation: กล้องดักถ่ายสัตว์ป่า

definition: A tracking device attached to wild animals
exampleSentence: Researchers fitted the elephant with a GPS collar.
laoTranslation: ປອກຄໍຕິດຕາມ GPS
thaiTranslation: ปลอกคอติดตาม GPS

definition: Marking animals for tracking and study
exampleSentence: Tagging helps scientists study migration patterns.
laoTranslation: ການຕິດປ້າຍຕິດຕາມ

definition: A count of trees or wildlife in a forest
exampleSentence: The forest census recorded over a hundred species.
laoTranslation: ການສຳຫລວດປ່າໄມ້
thaiTranslation: การสำรวจสำมะโนป่าไม้

definition: A study assessing the variety of species in an area
exampleSentence: The biodiversity survey identified several rare plants.

thaiTranslation: การสำรวจความหลากหลายทางชีวภาพ

definition: A recorded list of species found in an area

laoTranslation: ບັນຊີຊະນິດພັນ

definition: An assessment of the condition of a habitat
exampleSentence: The habitat survey guided the reserve's management plan.
laoTranslation: ການສຳຫລວດແຫລ່ງທີ່ຢູ່ອາໄສ
thaiTranslation: การสำรวจถิ่นที่อยู่อาศัย

definition: An evaluation of the condition of land resources
exampleSentence: The land health assessment revealed signs of erosion.

definition: Managing land to preserve its productivity long-term
exampleSentence: Sustainable land management protects the region's water supply.
laoTranslation: ການຄຸ້ມຄອງທີ່ດິນແບບຍືນຍົງ

definition: Evaluating the extent of harm done to land
exampleSentence: The land degradation assessment guided restoration priorities.

definition: The likelihood of a wildfire occurring
exampleSentence: Forest fire risk rises sharply in the dry season.
laoTranslation: ຄວາມສ່ຽງໄຟປ່າ

definition: An official measure of wildfire risk
exampleSentence: The fire danger rating reached its highest level today.
laoTranslation: ລະດັບຄວາມສ່ຽງໄຟໄໝ້
thaiTranslation: ระดับความเสี่ยงไฟป่า

definition: The period when wildfires are most likely
exampleSentence: Fire season begins as the dry weather sets in.

definition: Reduced visibility caused by fire smoke
exampleSentence: Smoke haze from wildfires covered the valley.
thaiTranslation: หมอกควันจากไฟไหม้

definition: Land visibly damaged by a past fire
exampleSentence: The burn scar is slowly regrowing with new plants.
thaiTranslation: รอยแผลเป็นจากไฟไหม้

definition: The natural regrowth of an area after a fire
exampleSentence: Post-fire recovery takes several years in this forest.
laoTranslation: ການຟື້ນຟູຫລັງໄຟໄໝ້
thaiTranslation: การฟื้นตัวหลังไฟไหม้

definition: Harvesting timber from trees damaged by fire or storm
exampleSentence: Salvage logging followed the wildfire.
laoTranslation: ການເກັບໄມ້ຫລັງໄພພິບັດ
thaiTranslation: การเก็บไม้หลังภัยพิบัติ

definition: Recovering usable wood from damaged trees
exampleSentence: Timber salvage reduced waste after the storm.
laoTranslation: ການເກັບໄມ້ຫລັງໄພພິບັດ
thaiTranslation: การเก็บไม้กู้คืนหลังภัยพิบัติ

definition: A strategy for restoring a damaged forest
exampleSentence: The forest recovery plan included new tree planting.
laoTranslation: ແຜນຟື້ນຟູປ່າໄມ້
thaiTranslation: แผนฟื้นฟูป่าไม้

definition: The process of restoring damaged land
exampleSentence: Land recovery after mining takes many years.
laoTranslation: ການຟື້ນຟູທີ່ດິນ
thaiTranslation: การฟื้นฟูที่ดิน

definition: The gradual change of an ecosystem over time
exampleSentence: Ecological succession follows a forest fire.
laoTranslation: ການສືບຕໍ່ທາງນິເວດ
thaiTranslation: การทดแทนทางนิเวศ

definition: The stable plant community reached after succession
exampleSentence: Climax vegetation returned decades after the disturbance.

thaiTranslation: พืชพรรณไคลแมกซ์

definition: An event that disrupts a forest's natural state
exampleSentence: Storms are a common forest disturbance in this region.
laoTranslation: ການລົບກວນປ່າໄມ້
thaiTranslation: การรบกวนป่าไม้

definition: The typical pattern of natural events shaping an ecosystem
exampleSentence: Fire is part of the natural disturbance regime here.
laoTranslation: ຮູບແບບການລົບກວນທຳມະຊາດ
thaiTranslation: รูปแบบการรบกวนตามธรรมชาติ

definition: Confidence in one's legal right to use land
exampleSentence: Land tenure security encourages farmers to invest in their soil.
laoTranslation: ຄວາມໝັ້ນຄົງໃນການຄອບຄອງທີ່ດິນ
thaiTranslation: ความมั่นคงในการถือครองที่ดิน

definition: A traditional sign showing where community land ends
exampleSentence: A large stone served as the customary boundary marker.
laoTranslation: ເຄື່ອງໝາຍຂອບເຂດປະເພນີ
thaiTranslation: หมุดหมายเขตแดนตามจารีตประเพณี

definition: The defined edge of a logging concession area
exampleSentence: The forest concession boundary was clearly marked with signs.
laoTranslation: ຂອບເຂດສຳປະທານປ່າ
thaiTranslation: แนวเขตสัมปทานป่าไม้

definition: A detailed schedule for cutting trees sustainably
exampleSentence: The timber harvest plan spans the next ten years.
laoTranslation: ແຜນການເກັບກ່ຽວໄມ້
thaiTranslation: แผนการเก็บเกี่ยวไม้

definition: A steady, long-term source of harvestable wood
exampleSentence: Replanting ensures a sustainable timber supply.
laoTranslation: ການສະໜອງໄມ້ແບບຍືນຍົງ
thaiTranslation: อุปทานไม้แบบยั่งยืน

definition: Data showing expected timber production over time
exampleSentence: Foresters use a yield table to plan harvests.
laoTranslation: ຕາຕະລາງຜົນຜະລິດປ່າໄມ້
thaiTranslation: ตารางผลผลิตป่าไม้

definition: An organization that verifies sustainable timber practices
exampleSentence: The timber certification body inspected the plantation.
laoTranslation: ອົງການຢັ້ງຢືນໄມ້
thaiTranslation: หน่วยงานรับรองไม้

exampleSentence: The cat ran down the alley.
We turned onto a quiet lane.

definition: A wide street, often lined with trees
exampleSentence: The shop is on the main avenue.
thaiTranslation: ถนนสายใหญ่

exampleSentence: We strolled along the boulevard.
laoTranslation: ຖະໜົນໃຫຍ່ມີຕົ້ນໄມ້
thaiTranslation: ถนนสายใหญ่มีต้นไม้

exampleSentence: Turn left at the crossroads.
Wait for the light at the intersection.

definition: A circular junction where traffic flows one way
exampleSentence: Take the second exit at the roundabout.

definition: A road built above another road
exampleSentence: We drove under the overpass.

definition: A bridge carrying one road over another
exampleSentence: Traffic was heavy on the flyover.
thaiTranslation: สะพานลอยข้ามถนน

definition: A road or path passing underneath another
exampleSentence: Pedestrians use the underpass to cross safely.

definition: A paved path for walking beside a road
exampleSentence: Children played on the sidewalk.

definition: A paved surface for walking, especially in British English
exampleSentence: She waited on the pavement for the bus.
laoTranslation: ທາງຍ່າງຄົນຍ່າງ

definition: An open area surrounded by buildings
exampleSentence: Children played in the courtyard.
Vendors set up stalls in the plaza.

definition: An open area in a town, often surrounded by buildings
exampleSentence: We met in the town square.

definition: A recognizable feature used to identify a location
exampleSentence: The temple is a famous landmark.
laoTranslation: ສະຖານທີ່ສຳຄັນ
thaiTranslation: สถานที่สำคัญ

definition: A structure built to honor a person or event
exampleSentence: The monument stands in the city center.
laoTranslation: ອະນຸສາວະລີ
thaiTranslation: อนุสาวรีย์

definition: A carved or cast figure of a person or animal
exampleSentence: A statue stands in the park.

definition: The outline of buildings against the sky
exampleSentence: The city skyline is beautiful at sunset.
laoTranslation: ເສັ້ນຂອບຟ້າຕຶກ
thaiTranslation: เส้นขอบฟ้าของเมือง

definition: A residential area outside a city center
exampleSentence: They moved to a quiet suburb.

definition: The outer areas of a town or city
exampleSentence: The factory is on the outskirts of town.

definition: The central business area of a city
exampleSentence: We shopped downtown all afternoon.
laoTranslation: ໃຈກາງເມືອງ
thaiTranslation: ย่านใจกลางเมือง

definition: The residential area of a city, away from downtown
exampleSentence: They live uptown near the park.
laoTranslation: ຍ່ານທີ່ຢູ່ອາໄສຊັ້ນສູງ
thaiTranslation: ย่านที่อยู่อาศัยชั้นดี

definition: A district within a town or city

definition: The study of production, trade, and wealth

definition: A person who studies the economy

definition: An increase in size or value

definition: An increase in a country's production of goods

definition: The process of growth or improvement

exampleSentence: Tourism is a major industry here.
thaiTranslation: อุตสาหกรรม

definition: A distinct part of the economy

definition: Businesses owned by individuals, not the government
exampleSentence: The private sector drives job creation.

definition: The production of goods on a large scale

Rice production increased this year.
New machines improved factory productivity.

exampleSentence: Farm output rose after the new irrigation system.

definition: The ability to do something without waste
exampleSentence: Efficiency in farming increases profits.

exampleSentence: The labor force grew as more young people entered jobs.

thaiTranslation: กำลังแรงงาน

definition: The total number of people employed
exampleSentence: The factory's workforce doubled last year.

definition: The state of being extremely poor

definition: Having a great deal of money

definition: The uneven distribution of income in society

definition: The amount of money needed to live in a place

definition: The value of money in terms of what it can buy

definition: The relationship between what is available and wanted

definition: An economy with limited government control

exampleSentence: The central bank raised interest rates.

exampleSentence: The national debt grew during the recession.

exampleSentence: His gross income includes bonuses.
Her net income after tax is lower.
laoTranslation: ລາຍໄດ້ສຸດທິ
thaiTranslation: รายได้สุทธิ

definition: The total value of goods and services produced

laoTranslation: ຜະລິດຕະພັນມວນລວມພາຍໃນ
thaiTranslation: ผลิตภัณฑ์มวลรวมในประเทศ

definition: The percentage rise in prices over time

exampleSentence: The consumer price index tracks inflation.

definition: A market where shares are traded
exampleSentence: Shares are traded on the stock exchange.

definition: The price of one share of a company

definition: A payment made to shareholders from profit
exampleSentence: The company paid a dividend this quarter.

definition: Profit from selling an asset for more than its cost
exampleSentence: She earned a capital gain on the sale of her land.

definition: The difference between a country's exports and imports

definition: A record of a country's financial transactions with others

definition: Government strategy for managing the economy

definition: The money used in a country

definition: Gold held by a country's central bank

definition: A general rise in prices over time

exampleSentence: Deflation can slow economic growth.

definition: Debt owed by a national government

definition: Small loans to people without access to normal banking

definition: Money invested in new, risky businesses

definition: The activity of starting new businesses

exampleSentence: The tech startup grew quickly.

exampleSentence: The corporation employs thousands of workers.

definition: A company operating in many countries
exampleSentence: The multinational corporation built a factory here.

definition: A person who owns shares in a company

definition: A person with an interest in a business or project

definition: The joining of two companies into one

definition: The purchase of one company by another
exampleSentence: The acquisition expanded the firm's market share.

definition: The amount of a good available

definition: The desire for goods or services
exampleSentence: Demand for electronics is growing.

definition: The point where supply equals demand
exampleSentence: The market reached equilibrium at a lower price.

definition: A statistic showing the state of the economy

definition: A twelve-month period used for budgeting

definition: An official examination of financial records

definition: A person who manages financial records
exampleSentence: The accountant prepared the tax report.

definition: The recording and analysis of financial transactions
exampleSentence: She studied accounting at college.

definition: A financial statement showing assets and liabilities
exampleSentence: The balance sheet showed strong growth.

definition: A financial report showing profit and loss

definition: Producing goods locally instead of importing them
exampleSentence: Import substitution reduced reliance on foreign goods.
laoTranslation: ການທົດແທນການນຳເຂົ້າ
thaiTranslation: การทดแทนการนำเข้า

definition: The development of industries in an economy
exampleSentence: Rapid industrialization changed the city's skyline.
laoTranslation: ການພັດທະນາອຸດສາຫະກຳ
thaiTranslation: การพัฒนาอุตสาหกรรม

definition: The decline of industrial activity in an economy
exampleSentence: Deindustrialization led to factory closures.
laoTranslation: ການຫລຸດຖອຍອຸດສາຫະກຳ
thaiTranslation: การถดถอยของภาคอุตสาหกรรม

definition: The growth of cities as people move from rural areas
exampleSentence: Urbanization increased demand for housing.
laoTranslation: ການເປັນຕົວເມືອງ
thaiTranslation: การกลายเป็นเมือง

definition: The movement of people from the countryside to cities
exampleSentence: Rural-urban migration changed the city's population.
laoTranslation: ການເຄື່ອນຍ້າຍຈາກຊົນນະບົດສູ່ຕົວເມືອງ
thaiTranslation: การย้ายถิ่นจากชนบทสู่เมือง

definition: An economy relying heavily on money sent from abroad
exampleSentence: The remittance economy supports many rural families.
laoTranslation: ເສດຖະກິດອີງເງິນສົ່ງກັບ
thaiTranslation: เศรษฐกิจที่พึ่งพาเงินโอนกลับ

definition: A country or business involved in trade
exampleSentence: China is a major trade partner.

definition: A group of countries with shared trade agreements
exampleSentence: The trading bloc reduced tariffs between members.
laoTranslation: ກຸ່ມການຄ້າ
thaiTranslation: กลุ่มการค้า

definition: A trade deal between countries in a region
exampleSentence: The regional trade agreement boosted cross-border commerce.
laoTranslation: ສັນຍາການຄ້າພາກພື້ນ
thaiTranslation: ข้อตกลงการค้าภูมิภาค

exampleSentence: Bilateral trade between the two nations grew steadily.
laoTranslation: ການຄ້າທະວິພາຄີ
thaiTranslation: การค้าทวิภาคี

definition: Trade involving many countries at once
exampleSentence: Multilateral trade agreements set global trade rules.
laoTranslation: ການຄ້າຫລາຍຝ່າຍ
thaiTranslation: การค้าพหุภาคี

definition: An international body regulating global trade
exampleSentence: The dispute was brought to the World Trade Organization.
laoTranslation: ອົງການການຄ້າໂລກ
thaiTranslation: องค์การการค้าโลก

definition: An international institution providing loans for development
exampleSentence: The World Bank funded the new water project.
laoTranslation: ທະນາຄານໂລກ

definition: An organization that promotes global monetary cooperation
exampleSentence: The International Monetary Fund provided emergency loans.
laoTranslation: ອົງການກອງທຶນການເງິນສາກົນ
thaiTranslation: กองทุนการเงินระหว่างประเทศ

definition: A bank that funds economic development projects
exampleSentence: The development bank financed the new highway.
laoTranslation: ທະນາຄານພັດທະນາ
thaiTranslation: ธนาคารเพื่อการพัฒนา

definition: Financial or material help given by one country to another
exampleSentence: Foreign aid supported the rebuilding effort.
laoTranslation: ການຊ່ວຍເຫລືອຈາກຕ່າງປະເທດ
thaiTranslation: ความช่วยเหลือจากต่างประเทศ

definition: Support given to help a country's economy grow
exampleSentence: Development assistance funded rural schools.
laoTranslation: ການຊ່ວຍເຫລືອດ້ານພັດທະນາ
thaiTranslation: ความช่วยเหลือเพื่อการพัฒนา

definition: Financial support to strengthen an economy
exampleSentence: Economic assistance helped stabilize the currency.
laoTranslation: ການຊ່ວຍເຫລືອທາງເສດຖະກິດ
thaiTranslation: ความช่วยเหลือทางเศรษฐกิจ

definition: Conditions attached to an international loan
exampleSentence: Loan conditionality required economic reforms.
laoTranslation: ເງື່ອນໄຂເງິນກູ້
thaiTranslation: เงื่อนไขเงินกู้

definition: Economic reforms required as a condition for loans
exampleSentence: Structural adjustment programs reduced government spending.
laoTranslation: ການປັບໂຄງສ້າງ
thaiTranslation: การปรับโครงสร้าง

definition: Reliance of one economy on another
exampleSentence: Economic dependency on a single export is risky.
laoTranslation: ການເພິ່ງພາທາງເສດຖະກິດ
thaiTranslation: การพึ่งพาทางเศรษฐกิจ

definition: Economic problems linked to abundant natural resources
exampleSentence: The resource curse affected countries rich in oil.
laoTranslation: ຄຳສາບຊັບພະຍາກອນ
thaiTranslation: คำสาปทรัพยากร

definition: Economic harm caused by a booming resource sector
exampleSentence: Dutch disease weakened the country's manufacturing.
laoTranslation: ພະຍາດເສດຖະກິດແບບໂຮນລັງ

definition: The process of generating economic worth
exampleSentence: Innovation drives value creation in business.
laoTranslation: ການສ້າງມູນຄ່າ
thaiTranslation: การสร้างมูลค่า

definition: The worth of a good or service in monetary terms
exampleSentence: The economic value of tourism grew significantly.
laoTranslation: ມູນຄ່າທາງເສດຖະກິດ
thaiTranslation: มูลค่าทางเศรษฐกิจ

definition: The inherent worth of something, not based on price
exampleSentence: Some argue nature has intrinsic value beyond economics.
laoTranslation: ມູນຄ່າແທ້ຈິງ
thaiTranslation: มูลค่าที่แท้จริง

definition: The price something would sell for in the market
exampleSentence: The market value of the land doubled.
laoTranslation: ມູນຄ່າຕະຫລາດ
thaiTranslation: มูลค่าตลาด

definition: The value of an asset as recorded in accounts
exampleSentence: The equipment's book value decreased each year.
laoTranslation: ມູນຄ່າຕາມບັນຊີ
thaiTranslation: มูลค่าตามบัญชี

definition: An asset that loses value over time
exampleSentence: A car is a depreciating asset.
laoTranslation: ຊັບສິນທີ່ມູນຄ່າຫລຸດລົງ
thaiTranslation: สินทรัพย์ที่มูลค่าลดลง

definition: An asset that gains value over time
exampleSentence: Land is often an appreciating asset.
laoTranslation: ຊັບສິນທີ່ມູນຄ່າເພີ່ມຂຶ້ນ
thaiTranslation: สินทรัพย์ที่มูลค่าเพิ่มขึ้น

definition: Understanding how to manage money effectively
exampleSentence: Financial literacy programs teach budgeting skills.
laoTranslation: ຄວາມຮູ້ທາງການເງິນ
thaiTranslation: ความรู้ทางการเงิน

definition: The management of an individual's money
exampleSentence: Personal finance courses help students save wisely.
laoTranslation: ການເງິນສ່ວນບຸກຄົນ
thaiTranslation: การเงินส่วนบุคคล

definition: The management of a family's money and expenses
exampleSentence: Household finance includes rent, food, and savings.
laoTranslation: ການເງິນຄົວເຮືອນ
thaiTranslation: การเงินครัวเรือน

definition: Organizing finances to meet future goals
exampleSentence: Financial planning helps prepare for retirement.
laoTranslation: ການວາງແຜນທາງການເງິນ
thaiTranslation: การวางแผนทางการเงิน

definition: Preparing financially for life after work
exampleSentence: Retirement planning should start early.
laoTranslation: ການວາງແຜນກ່ອນກະສຽນອາຍຸ
thaiTranslation: การวางแผนเกษียณ

definition: Planning how assets will be distributed after death
exampleSentence: Estate planning ensures assets go to the right people.
laoTranslation: ການວາງແຜນມູນມໍລະດົກ
thaiTranslation: การวางแผนมรดก

definition: Money or property received from someone who has died
exampleSentence: She used her inheritance to start a business.
laoTranslation: ມູນມໍລະດົກ

definition: A legal document stating how assets are distributed after death
exampleSentence: He wrote a will before the trip.

definition: Assets held and managed for a beneficiary
exampleSentence: The trust fund pays for her education.
laoTranslation: ກອງທຶນທະຣັດ

definition: The lasting economic effects of past decisions
exampleSentence: The dam's economic legacy includes cheap electricity.
laoTranslation: ມູນເຊື້ອທາງເສດຖະກິດ
thaiTranslation: มรดกทางเศรษฐกิจ

definition: Increasing people's financial independence and opportunity
exampleSentence: Microloans support women's economic empowerment.
laoTranslation: ການສ້າງອຳນາດທາງເສດຖະກິດ
thaiTranslation: การเสริมพลังทางเศรษฐกิจ

definition: Access to affordable financial services for everyone
exampleSentence: Mobile banking has improved financial inclusion.
laoTranslation: ການເຂົ້າເຖິງບໍລິການທາງການເງິນ
thaiTranslation: การเข้าถึงบริการทางการเงิน

definition: People without access to formal banking services
exampleSentence: Mobile money reached the unbanked population.
laoTranslation: ປະຊາກອນທີ່ບໍ່ມີບັນຊີທະນາຄານ
thaiTranslation: ประชากรที่ไม่มีบัญชีธนาคาร

definition: Creating simplified representations of economic behavior
exampleSentence: Economic model building helps predict policy outcomes.
laoTranslation: ການສ້າງແບບຈຳລອງເສດຖະກິດ
thaiTranslation: การสร้างแบบจำลองเศรษฐกิจ

definition: A method examining relationships between economic sectors
exampleSentence: Input-output analysis shows how industries depend on each other.
laoTranslation: ການວິເຄາະປັດໄຈການຜະລິດ-ຜົນຜະລິດ
thaiTranslation: การวิเคราะห์ปัจจัยนำเข้า-ผลผลิต

definition: A measure of how demand responds to price changes
exampleSentence: Rice has low price elasticity because it's a staple.
laoTranslation: ຄວາມຢືດຢຸ່ນ
thaiTranslation: ความยืดหยุ่น

definition: How much demand changes when price changes
exampleSentence: High price elasticity means demand drops sharply if prices rise.
laoTranslation: ຄວາມຢືດຢຸ່ນຂອງລາຄາ
thaiTranslation: ความยืดหยุ่นของราคา

definition: A graph showing the relationship between price and demand
exampleSentence: The demand curve slopes downward as prices fall.
laoTranslation: ເສັ້ນອຸປະສົງ
thaiTranslation: เส้นอุปสงค์

definition: A graph showing the relationship between price and supply
exampleSentence: The supply curve shifted after new farms opened.
laoTranslation: ເສັ້ນອຸປະທານ
thaiTranslation: เส้นอุปทาน

definition: The price where supply equals demand
exampleSentence: The equilibrium price stabilized after the harvest.
laoTranslation: ລາຄາດຸ່ນດ່ຽງ
thaiTranslation: ราคาดุลยภาพ

exampleSentence: The price ceiling kept rice affordable during the shortage.
The price floor protected farmers from falling prices.
thaiTranslation: ราคาขั้นต่ำ

definition: The overall benefit gained by buyers and sellers
exampleSentence: Economic surplus increased with the new trade deal.
laoTranslation: ສ່ວນເກີນທາງເສດຖະກິດ
thaiTranslation: ส่วนเกินทางเศรษฐกิจ

definition: The benefit consumers gain from paying less than they would
exampleSentence: Lower prices increased consumer surplus.
laoTranslation: ສ່ວນເກີນຜູ້ບໍລິໂພກ
thaiTranslation: ส่วนเกินผู้บริโภค

definition: The benefit producers gain from selling above their cost
exampleSentence: Higher prices increased producer surplus for farmers.
laoTranslation: ສ່ວນເກີນຜູ້ຜະລິດ
thaiTranslation: ส่วนเกินผู้ผลิต

definition: Lost economic efficiency due to market distortion
exampleSentence: The tax created a deadweight loss in the market.
laoTranslation: ການສູນເສຍທາງເສດຖະກິດ
thaiTranslation: การสูญเสียส่วนเกินทางเศรษฐกิจ

definition: An interference that prevents efficient market outcomes
exampleSentence: Subsidies can cause market distortion.
laoTranslation: ການບິດເບືອນຕະຫລາດ
thaiTranslation: การบิดเบือนตลาด

definition: Payment beyond what is needed to keep a resource in use
exampleSentence: Landowners near the city earn high economic rent.
laoTranslation: ຄ່າເຊົ່າທາງເສດຖະກິດ
thaiTranslation: ค่าเช่าทางเศรษฐศาสตร์

definition: Resources used to produce goods and services
exampleSentence: Land, labor, and capital are factors of production.
laoTranslation: ປັດໄຈການຜະລິດ
thaiTranslation: ปัจจัยการผลิต

definition: A relationship between inputs and output in production
exampleSentence: The production function shows how output changes with labor.
laoTranslation: ໜ້າທີ່ການຜະລິດ
thaiTranslation: ฟังก์ชันการผลิต

definition: Output produced per unit of labor
exampleSentence: New machines boosted labor productivity on the farm.
laoTranslation: ຜະລິດຕະພາບແຮງງານ
thaiTranslation: ผลิตภาพแรงงาน

definition: A measure of overall efficiency in production
exampleSentence: Total factor productivity improved with better technology.
laoTranslation: ຜະລິດຕະພາບລວມປັດໄຈ
thaiTranslation: ผลิตภาพปัจจัยรวม

definition: Cost savings from producing multiple related products
exampleSentence: Economies of scope let the factory make several goods cheaply.
laoTranslation: ການປະຫຍັດຈາກຂອບເຂດ
thaiTranslation: การประหยัดจากขอบข่าย

definition: A company controlling multiple stages of production
exampleSentence: Vertical integration let the company control farming and processing.
laoTranslation: ການລວມຕົວແນວຕັ້ງ
thaiTranslation: การรวมกิจการแนวตั้ง

definition: A company combining with competitors at the same stage
exampleSentence: Horizontal integration reduced competition in the market.
laoTranslation: ການລວມຕົວແນວນອນ
thaiTranslation: การรวมกิจการแนวนอน

definition: The degree to which few firms dominate a market
exampleSentence: High economic concentration can reduce competition.
laoTranslation: ການລວມສູນທາງເສດຖະກິດ
thaiTranslation: การกระจุกตัวทางเศรษฐกิจ

definition: A market dominated by a few large firms
exampleSentence: The airline industry is often an oligopoly.
laoTranslation: ຕະຫລາດຜູ້ຂາຍໜ້ອຍລາຍ
thaiTranslation: ตลาดผู้ขายน้อยราย

definition: A group of firms that agree to control prices
exampleSentence: The cartel controlled oil prices for years.
laoTranslation: ກຸ່ມຮ່ວມມືຄວບຄຸມລາຄາ
thaiTranslation: กลุ่มพันธมิตรทางการค้า

definition: An illegal agreement to set prices
exampleSentence: The companies were fined for price fixing.
laoTranslation: ການກຳນົດລາຄາຮ່ວມກັນ
thaiTranslation: การกำหนดราคาร่วมกัน

exampleSentence: Antitrust law blocked the proposed merger.
laoTranslation: ກົດໝາຍຕ້ານການຜູກຂາດ
thaiTranslation: กฎหมายป้องกันการผูกขาด

definition: Laws and policies defending buyers' rights
exampleSentence: Consumer protection laws prevent false advertising.
laoTranslation: ການປົກປ້ອງຜູ້ບໍລິໂພກ
thaiTranslation: การคุ้มครองผู้บริโภค

definition: The degree of freedom individuals have in economic choices
exampleSentence: Economic freedom indexes rank countries by market openness.
laoTranslation: ເສລີພາບທາງເສດຖະກິດ
thaiTranslation: เสรีภาพทางเศรษฐกิจ

definition: Favoring minimal government intervention in the economy
exampleSentence: Laissez-faire policy reduced business regulation.
laoTranslation: ນະໂຍບາຍປ່ອຍໃຫ້ຕະຫລາດເສລີ
thaiTranslation: นโยบายปล่อยเสรี

definition: A business owned and operated by the government
exampleSentence: The state-owned enterprise controls electricity production.
laoTranslation: ວິສາຫະກິດຂອງລັດ
thaiTranslation: รัฐวิสาหกิจ

definition: A project jointly run by government and private business
exampleSentence: The road was built through a public-private partnership.
laoTranslation: ການຮ່ວມມືລັດ-ເອກະຊົນ
thaiTranslation: ความร่วมมือรัฐ-เอกชน

definition: Spending on roads, bridges, and public systems
exampleSentence: Infrastructure investment improved trade routes.
laoTranslation: ການລົງທຶນພື້ນຖານໂຄງລ່າງ
thaiTranslation: การลงทุนโครงสร้างพื้นฐาน

exampleSentence: Capital expenditure funded the new factory.
laoTranslation: ລາຍຈ່າຍລົງທຶນ
thaiTranslation: รายจ่ายลงทุน

definition: The cost of running day-to-day business
exampleSentence: Rent and wages are common operating expenses.
laoTranslation: ຄ່າໃຊ້ຈ່າຍໃນການດຳເນີນງານ
thaiTranslation: ค่าใช้จ่ายในการดำเนินงาน

definition: Ongoing business expenses not tied to production
exampleSentence: Overhead costs include rent and utilities.
laoTranslation: ຄ່າໃຊ້ຈ່າຍປະຈຳ
thaiTranslation: ค่าใช้จ่ายส่วนกลาง

definition: The point where revenue equals costs
exampleSentence: The shop reached its break-even point after six months.
laoTranslation: ຈຸດຄຸ້ມທຶນ
thaiTranslation: จุดคุ้มทุน

definition: The percentage of revenue kept as profit
exampleSentence: The company improved its profit margin this year.

definition: A measure of profit relative to investment cost
exampleSentence: The project offered a strong return on investment.
laoTranslation: ຜົນຕອບແທນຈາກການລົງທຶນ
thaiTranslation: ผลตอบแทนจากการลงทุน

definition: The pointer on a clock showing hours or minutes
exampleSentence: The clock hand moved slowly toward twelve.
thaiTranslation: เข็มนาฬิกา

definition: The repeated sound made by a clock
exampleSentence: The ticking of the clock filled the quiet room.
laoTranslation: ສຽງນາທີກາຕິກ
thaiTranslation: เสียงติ๊กต่อก

definition: A container of items buried to be found in the future
exampleSentence: Students buried a time capsule in the schoolyard.
laoTranslation: ກ່ອງເກັບປະຫວັດເວລາ
thaiTranslation: แคปซูลเวลา

definition: A major shift in how an economy functions
exampleSentence: Economic transformation followed the opening of new markets.
laoTranslation: ການປ່ຽນແປງທາງເສດຖະກິດ
thaiTranslation: การเปลี่ยนแปลงทางเศรษฐกิจ

definition: The process of an economy returning to growth
exampleSentence: Economic recovery followed the end of the drought.
laoTranslation: ການຟື້ນຕົວທາງເສດຖະກິດ
thaiTranslation: การฟื้นตัวทางเศรษฐกิจ

definition: An economy's ability to withstand shocks
exampleSentence: Diversified industries improve economic resilience.
laoTranslation: ຄວາມທົນທານທາງເສດຖະກິດ
